basics.name: Li-yu Patrick Lo
basics.summary: Aspire to become a genuine roboticist someday, currently a research student @ AIRO-lab of HKPolyU.

work.name: Research Centre of Unmanned Autonomous Systems, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University
work.summary: Teaching at Palmer Physical Laboratory (now 302 Frist Campus Center). While not a professor at Princeton, I associated with the physics professors and continued to give lectures on campus.
